critical_issues.title: Secret scan acceptance criterion not reproducible without in-repo config
critical_issues.resolution: Added repository-managed .trufflehog-exclude.txt and updated findings command to use it.

suggestions.title: Validate optional Key Vault sensitive setting path
suggestions.resolution: Added assertion for TRAPI_FALLBACK_CREDENTIAL Key Vault reference.

suggestions.title: Enforce vars-based Azure OIDC IDs in integration workflow too
suggestions.resolution: Extended OIDC vars assertions to integration-staging.yml.

suggestions.title: Broaden local settings placeholder coverage
suggestions.resolution: Added DATA_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME to required and placeholder assertions.

suggestions.title: Assert creds-based azure/login auth is not used
suggestions.resolution: Added assertion that workflows with azure/login do not use creds: authentication.
